setup_code:
import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

tests.name: linear_forward
tests.code:
torch.manual_seed(0)
x=torch.randn(4,3); w=torch.randn(2,3); b=torch.randn(2)
y=linear(x, w, b)
y_ref = x @ w.T + b
assert torch.allclose(y, y_ref, atol=1e-5), f'linear forward mismatch: max diff {(y-y_ref).abs().max():.6f}'

tests.name: linear_backward_x
tests.code:
torch.manual_seed(1)
x_pt=torch.randn(4,3,requires_grad=True); w_pt=torch.randn(2,3,requires_grad=True); b_pt=torch.randn(2,requires_grad=True)
(x_pt @ w_pt.T + b_pt).mean().backward()
x_o=x_pt.detach().clone(); w_o=w_pt.detach().clone(); b_o=b_pt.detach().clone()
ctx=[]; y=linear(x_o,w_o,b_o,ctx=ctx); l=mean(y,ctx=ctx); backward(l,ctx)
assert torch.allclose(x_o.grad, x_pt.grad, atol=1e-5), f'x.grad mismatch'

tests.name: linear_backward_w
tests.code:
torch.manual_seed(1)
x_pt=torch.randn(4,3,requires_grad=True); w_pt=torch.randn(2,3,requires_grad=True); b_pt=torch.randn(2,requires_grad=True)
(x_pt @ w_pt.T + b_pt).mean().backward()
x_o=x_pt.detach().clone(); w_o=w_pt.detach().clone(); b_o=b_pt.detach().clone()
ctx=[]; y=linear(x_o,w_o,b_o,ctx=ctx); l=mean(y,ctx=ctx); backward(l,ctx)
assert torch.allclose(w_o.grad, w_pt.grad, atol=1e-5), f'w.grad mismatch'

tests.name: linear_backward_b
tests.code:
torch.manual_seed(1)
x_pt=torch.randn(4,3,requires_grad=True); w_pt=torch.randn(2,3,requires_grad=True); b_pt=torch.randn(2,requires_grad=True)
(x_pt @ w_pt.T + b_pt).mean().backward()
x_o=x_pt.detach().clone(); w_o=w_pt.detach().clone(); b_o=b_pt.detach().clone()
ctx=[]; y=linear(x_o,w_o,b_o,ctx=ctx); l=mean(y,ctx=ctx); backward(l,ctx)
assert torch.allclose(b_o.grad, b_pt.grad, atol=1e-5), f'b.grad mismatch'

tests.name: relu_forward
tests.code:
x=torch.tensor([-2.,-1.,0.,1.,2.])
y=relu(x.clone())
assert torch.allclose(y, torch.tensor([0.,0.,0.,1.,2.])), f'relu forward: {y}'

tests.name: relu_backward
tests.code:
torch.manual_seed(2)
x_pt=torch.randn(3,4,requires_grad=True)
torch.relu(x_pt).mean().backward()
x_o=x_pt.detach().clone(); ctx=[]; y=relu(x_o,ctx=ctx); l=mean(y,ctx=ctx); backward(l,ctx)
assert torch.allclose(x_o.grad, x_pt.grad, atol=1e-5), f'relu backward mismatch'

tests.name: ce_forward
tests.code:
torch.manual_seed(3)
z=torch.randn(8,5); t=torch.randint(0,5,(8,))
loss_pt = F.cross_entropy(z, t)
loss_o = cross_entropy_loss(z.clone(), t)
assert torch.allclose(loss_o, loss_pt, atol=1e-4), f'CE loss mismatch: {loss_o.item():.6f} vs {loss_pt.item():.6f}'

tests.name: ce_backward
tests.code:
torch.manual_seed(3)
z_pt=torch.randn(8,5,requires_grad=True); t=torch.randint(0,5,(8,))
F.cross_entropy(z_pt, t).backward()
z_o=z_pt.detach().clone(); ctx=[]; loss=cross_entropy_loss(z_o,t,ctx=ctx); backward(loss,ctx)
assert torch.allclose(z_o.grad, z_pt.grad, atol=1e-4), f'CE backward mismatch: max diff {(z_o.grad-z_pt.grad).abs().max():.6f}'

tests.name: linear_layer
tests.code:
layer=Linear(10,5)
assert layer.weight.shape==(5,10), f'weight shape {layer.weight.shape}'
assert layer.bias.shape==(5,), f'bias shape {layer.bias.shape}'
assert len(layer.parameters())==2
ctx=[]; y=layer(torch.randn(3,10),ctx=ctx)
assert y.shape==(3,5), f'output shape {y.shape}'
assert len(ctx)==1, f'ctx length {len(ctx)}'

tests.name: softmax_classifier
tests.code:
m=SoftmaxClassifier(784,10)
y=m(torch.randn(4,784))
assert y.shape==(4,10), f'output shape {y.shape}'

tests.name: mlp_model
tests.code:
m=MLP(784,128,10)
y=m(torch.randn(4,784))
assert y.shape==(4,10), f'output shape {y.shape}'
assert sum(p.numel() for p in m.parameters()) > 784*10, 'MLP should have more params than linear'

tests.name: sgd_step
tests.code:
p=torch.tensor([1.,2.,3.]); p.grad=torch.tensor([0.1,0.2,0.3])
opt=SGD([p],lr=1.0); opt.step()
assert torch.allclose(p, torch.tensor([0.9,1.8,2.7])), f'after step: {p}'

tests.name: sgd_zero_grad
tests.code:
p=torch.tensor([1.,2.]); p.grad=torch.tensor([0.5,0.5])
opt=SGD([p],lr=0.1); opt.zero_grad()
assert p.grad is None or (p.grad==0).all(), f'after zero_grad: {p.grad}'

tests.name: train_epoch_runs
tests.code:
m=MLP(784,128,10); opt=SGD(m.parameters(),lr=0.1)
import torchvision, torchvision.transforms as T
tf=T.Compose([T.ToTensor(),T.Normalize((0.1307,),(0.3081,))])
td=torchvision.datasets.MNIST('./data',train=True,download=True,transform=tf)
small=torch.utils.data.Subset(td, range(512))
loader=torch.utils.data.DataLoader(small,batch_size=128)
loss=train_epoch(m, opt, loader)
assert isinstance(loss, float), f'train_epoch should return float loss, got {type(loss)}'
assert loss < 5.0, f'loss too high after 1 epoch: {loss}'

tests.name: mnist_accuracy
tests.code:
# Check that model was trained and achieves reasonable accuracy
acc = evaluate(model, test_loader)
assert acc > 0.95, f'MLP accuracy {acc:.2%} is below 95%'
print(f'MLP test accuracy: {acc:.2%}')
